title: 'Revenge matter of time': IRGC-trained Iraqi arrested over assassination plot against Donald Trump's daughter Ivanka
summary_full: An IRGC-trained operative, allegedly seeking revenge for Qasem Soleimani's death, was arrested in Turkey and extradited to the US. Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi is accused of plotting to assassinate Ivanka Trump, even possessing a blueprint of her Florida home. He reportedly made threats against Americans online.
